_meta.description: Measured burst-protocol constants per syringe count. The burst uses ABSOLUTE calibrated rates from this file (not multipliers of the baseline). Keys are str(n_syringes). Re-measure with: python headless_rig.py calib ../experiments/Burst_Calibration_1rep.txt
_meta.sensor: Fluigent Flow Unit M, +/-120 uL/min full scale
_meta.units: rates uL/min combined line; times s; slopes uL/min/s

slopes.fall_note: descent mildly rate-dependent (320 fastest); undershoot after cutting reverse at baseline is ~12 uL/min below the cut point at ALL reverse rates -> rev_stop_offset 12 so the dip lands on baseline

slopes.fall_reverse_note: descent is discharge-dominated: slope nearly independent of reverse rate 160-320; no benefit above ~280
